name Access copy_trading_bot

on
  push
    branches [ main ]

jobs
  access-copy-bot
    runs-on ubuntu-latest

    steps
      - name Checkout hypermonitor.github.io
        uses actionscheckout@v4

      - name Checkout copy_trading_bot
        uses actionscheckout@v4
        with
          repository your-usernamecopy_trading_bot
          token ${{ secrets.COPY_TRADING_BOT_PAT }}
          path copy_trading_bot

      - name List files in copy_trading_bot
        run ls copy_trading_bot
